mission.title: schemahero: Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller
mission.description: Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller. Requested by 1+ users.

steps.title: Check current schemahero deployment
steps.description:
Verify your schemahero version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/name=schemahero
helm list -n schemahero 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working schemahero installation.

steps.title: Review schemahero configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant schemahero configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/name=schemahero
kubectl get configmap -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=schemahero
```
Currently my company has some admission webhooks that check for the presence of certain labels on deployments, pods etc.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller
steps.description:
Add a new DatabaseTemplate type which wraps an ObjectMeta to allow the
setting of custom labels on the Pods that ultimately get created by the
StatefulSet managed by this controller.

This also introduces the use of
```yaml
spec
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n schemahero -l app.kubernetes.io/name=schemahero
kubectl get events -n schemahero --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Allow adding labels to StatefulSet created by Controller" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Add a new DatabaseTemplate type which wraps an ObjectMeta to allow the
setting of custom labels on the Pods that ultimately get created by the
StatefulSet managed by this controller.

This also introduces the use of [envtest](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/controller-runtime/blob/master/FAQ.md#q-wheres-the-fake-client--how-do-i-use-it) for testing the controller logic.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: databases.schemahero.io/v1alpha4
kind: Database  
metadata:
  name: my-database
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  immediateDeploy: true
  template:
    metadata:
      labels: 
        my.com/something: value
  connection: 
    postgres:
      uri:
        value: postgresql://something:5432

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with schemahero installed or the issue environment reproducible.
